title.ko: 대부분 구동 목적을 위해서 사용되는 벨트, 케이블, 또는 로프; 체인; 대부분 그것을 위해 이용되는 충전물
title.en: BELTS, CABLES, OR ROPES, PREDOMINANTLY USED FOR DRIVING PURPOSES; CHAINS; FITTINGS PREDOMINANTLY USED THEREFOR

definition.ko: 벨트; 벨트 조임 F16G1/00, F16G5/00; F16G3/00, F16G7/00 케이블 또는 로프; 그것을 위한 고정수단 F16G9/00; F16G11/00 체인, 체인 후크 F16G13/00, F16G15/00, F16G17/00

title.ko: 전동용 벨트(V 벨트 F16G 5/00; 컨베이어 벨트 B65G)
title.en: Driving-belts (V-belts F16G0005000000;conveyor belts B65G)

title.ko: 가죽으로 만든 것(F16G 1/28이 우선; 그 제조 C14B 9/00)
title.en: made of leather (F16G0001280000 takes precedence;making thereof C14B0009000000)

title.ko: 섬유질재료로 만든 것, 예. 고무로 피복되어 있거나 또는 피복되어있지 않은 직물(F16G 1/28이 우선; 그 제조 D03D)
title.en: made of fibrous material, e.g. textiles, whether rubber-covered or not (F16G0001280000 takes precedence;making thereof D03D)

title.ko: 고무제(F16G 1/28이 우선; 플라스틱 또는 가소성 물질(plastic state)로 벨트를 제조하는 것 B29D 29/00)
title.en: made of rubber (F16G0001280000 takes precedence;producing belts from plastics or substances in a plastic state B29D0029000000)
with reinforcement bonded by the rubber
with textile reinforcement
with metal reinforcement

title.ko: 합성수지제(F16G 1/28이 우선; 플라스틱 또는 가소성(plastic state)물질로 벨트를 제조하는 것 B29D 29/00)
title.en: made of plastics (F16G0001280000 takes precedence;producing belts from plastics or substances in a plastic state B29D0029000000)
with reinforcement bonded by the plastic material

title.ko: 와이어제(그 제조 B21F 43/00)
title.en: made of wire (making thereof B21F0043000000)

title.ko: 단 금속판제(그 제조 B21D 53/04)
title.en: made of a single metal strip (making thereof B21D0053140000)
built-up from superimposed layers, e.g. zig-zag folded

title.ko: 몇 개의 부품으로 되어 있는 것
title.en: consisting of several parts

title.ko: 링크(link)모양의 것(체인링크 모양의 것 13/08)
title.en: in the form of links (in the shape of chain links F16G0013080000)
in the form of strips or lamellae
with a contact surface of special shape, e.g. toothed

title.ko: 벨트이음, 예. 컨베이어 벨트용(V 벨트용 F16G 7/00)
title.en: Belt fastenings, e.g. for conveyor belts (for V-belts F16G0007000000)

title.ko: 일련의 이음매 또는 그에 유사한 것이 핀으로 연결되어 힌지를 형성하고 있는 것(F16G 3/09가 우선)
title.en: with series of eyes or the like, interposed and linked by a pin to form a hinge (F16G0003090000 takes precedence)
in which the ends of separate U-shaped or like eyes are attached to the belt by parts penetrating into it
with outwardly-bent, mutually-connected belt ends
Friction clamps, e.g. of grommet-thimble type

title.ko: 금속판 및 볼트 또는 리벳으로 구성되는 것(F16G 3/06이 우선)
title.en: consisting of plates and screw-bolts or rivets (F16G0003060000 takes precedence)
the plates forming a hinge
Joining belts by sewing, sticking, vulcanising, or the like; Constructional adaptations of the belt ends for this purpose
Joining belts by lacing
with extensible parts; with resilient parts
Devices or machines for connecting driving-belts or the like

title.ko: V 벨트 즉 테이퍼단면을 가진 벨트
title.en: V-belts, i.e. belts of tapered cross-section

title.ko: 피혁제(F16G 5/20이 우선)
title.en: made of leather (F16G0005200000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 고무제(F16G 5/20이 우선)
title.en: made of rubber (F16G0005200000 takes precedence)
with reinforcement bonded by the rubber
with textile reinforcement
with metal reinforcement

title.ko: 합성수지제(F16G 5/20이 우선)
title.en: made of plastics (F16G0005200000 takes precedence)
with reinforcement bonded by the plastic material
consisting of several parts
in the form of links
with a contact surface of special shape, e.g. toothed
built-up from superimposed layers
zig-zag folded
V-belt fastenings
locked, e.g. riveted
quickly detachable
adjustable, e.g. for tension

title.ko: 특별히 전동을 위하여 사용되든가 또는 풀리(pulley) 또는 다른 전동요소에 의하여 전동되는 로프 또는 케이블
title.en: Ropes or cables specially adapted for driving, or for being driven by, pulleys or other gearing elements
made of leather; having enveloping sheathings made of leather

title.ko: 고무 또는 합성수지제(F16G 9/02가 우선)
title.en: made of rubber or plastics (F16G0009020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 케이블 또는 로프를 서로 또는 다른 것에 결합하는 수단; 케이블 또는 로프에 부착하기 위한 캡(Cap) 또는 슬리브(자동차 또는 케이지(Cage) 를 달아올리기 위한 로프 또는 케이블의 드럼(drum) 또는 원통에의 부속물 B66D 1/34; 지중굴착(earth drilling)의 로프클램프 E21B 19/12)
title.en: Means for fastening cables or ropes to one another or to other objects (cable clamps for suspension bridge cables E01D0019160000); Caps or sleeves for fixing on cables or ropes (attaching ropes or cables to lift cars or cages B66B0007080000, to winch drums or barrels B66D0001340000;rope clamps in earth drilling E21B0019120000)
with parts deformable to grip the cable or cables; Fastening means which engage a sleeve or the like fixed on the cable
incorporating resiliently-mounted members for attachment of the cable end

title.ko: 쐐기작용을 갖는 것, 예. 가장자리에 대는 딤블 (thimble) 형의 마찰클램프(F16G 11/02이 우선)
title.en: with wedging action, e.g. friction clamps of grommet-thimble type (F16G0011020000 takes precedence)
by using conical plugs insertable between the strands

title.ko: 가로 방향으로 배치된 나사를 갖는 것(F16G 11/02, F16G 11/04가 우선)
title.en: with laterally-arranged screws (F16G0011020000, F16G0011040000 take precedence)
Fastenings for securing ends of driving-cables to one another, the fastenings having approximately the same diameter as the cables
incorporating hinge joints or pivots for the attachment of the cable ends
Quick-acting fastenings; Clamps holding in one direction only
Connections or attachments, e.g. turnbuckles, adapted for straining of cables, ropes or wire

Devices or coupling-pieces designed for easy formation of adjustable loops, e.g. choker hooks; Hooks or eyes with integral parts designed to facilitate quick attachment to cables or ropes at any point, e.g. by forming loops

title.ko: 체인(그 제조 B21L)
title.en: Chains (making thereof B21L)

title.ko: 전동용 체인
title.en: Driving-chains
Toothed chains
with links connected by parallel driving-pins with or without rollers
the links being of identical shape, e.g. cranked

title.ko: 단단하게 조인트 핀 사이에 끼워진 링크를 갖는 것(F16G 13/04가 우선)
title.en: with links closely interposed on the joint pins (F16G0013040000 takes precedence)
with universal joints
Hauling- or hoisting-chains
built up from readily-separable links
with arrangements for holding electric cables, hoses, or the like
Chains having special overall characteristics
stiff; Push-pull chains
extensible
resilient

title.ko: 체인 커플링; 새클(shackle); 체인조인트; 체인링크; 체인부시(bush)(체인 부재의 제조 B21L)
title.en: Chain couplings; Shackles; Chain joints; Chain links; Chain bushes (making chain elements B21L)
for fastening more or less permanently

title.ko: 쉽게 분리가능한 체인 커플링 새클
title.en: Quickly-detachable chain couplings; Shackles

title.ko: 체인부재에 조인트 핀으로 접합할 수 있도록 되어 있는 새클. 예, D-새클
title.en: Shackles designed for attachment by joint pins to chain elements, e.g. D-shackles
Swivels
Emergency joints or links
Chain links
made of sheet metal, e.g. profiled

title.ko: 체인에 필수적인 부품으로서의 후크(크레인용 후크 B66C 1/34)
title.en: Hooks as integral parts of chains (hooks for cranes B66C0001340000)
